category_sources: Official GNOME EasyTAG page describes it as an audio file metadata editor.
source_facts.description says it is an application for viewing and editing audio file tags.
display_name_sources: Official GNOME wiki page title and app branding use EasyTAG.
source_facts.homepage is the GNOME EasyTAG application page.
docs_sources: Official GNOME EasyTAG app page is the project homepage and documentation surface.
Official GNOME help site provides EasyTAG user documentation.
repo_sources: Official GNOME EasyTAG page lists the Git repository as gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/easytag.git.
tags_sources: Official GNOME page lists supported audio tag formats including MP3, FLAC, Ogg, MusePack, Monkey's Audio, and WavPack.
source_facts.description identifies audio tag viewing and editing.
